data.body: MILESTONE: 4e19 CLOSED+signed (plan-review + completion-verifier attestations) after adding the producer/consumer integration test. Unblocked 7c84. 7c84 closing (Verified+1). e7e0 re-review #3 launched: prior review caught a REAL bug — completion_reconcile_input.schema.json is additionalProperties:false + the YAML doesn't thread criteria to the reconcile step, so criteria[] would be silently dropped in the workflow (close-gate) path. Plan now enumerates: contracts.py model, completion_verdict schema, completion_reconcile_input schema (+raw_criteria), completion-verification.yaml (thread raw_criteria), gate_ops completion_reconcile (set result['criteria']), prompt, sidecar SCHEMA_PASS, transition_close PASS emit. Gerrit: 687 Verified+1, 688 LLM+1/Verified+1.
